name: CS - Refund and cancellation request [Template]
description: Template version of CS - Refund and cancellation request. Issues both refund and cancellation in parallel from a single ticket. URLs and Slack channel templated from cs_project_config.

parameters.url: ={{ "https://" + $("When Executed by Another Workflow").item.json.zendeskDomain + ".zendesk.com/api/v2/tickets/" + $("When Executed by Another Workflow").item.json.ticketID }}

parameters.name: ticket.comment.body

nodes.name: Reply internally and set status to open

parameters.url: ={{ "https://" + $("When Executed by Another Workflow").item.json.zendeskDomain + ".zendesk.com/api/v2/tickets/" + $("When Executed by Another Workflow").item.json.ticketID }}

parameters.name: ticket.comment.body

nodes.name: Reply internally and set status to open1

parameters.content:
# Template configuration

**Set project_key** holds the hardcoded deployment key.
**Get Project Config** provides `payments_api_base_url` and `slack_automation_errors_channel_id`.

Other values (zendeskDomain, ticketID, ticketCustomStatusID, subscriptionID) come from the caller.

## To duplicate
- Duplicate this workflow.
- Change the value in **Set project_key**.
- Re-bind credentials and subworkflow IDs.

main.node: Reply internally and set status to open1
Reply internally and set status to open
